title: Section 20
content: For the purpose of 1[enabling the Institutes] to discharge its functions efficiently under this Act, the Central Government may, after due appropriation made by Parliament by law in this behalf, 2[pay to each Institute] in each financial year such sums of money and in such manner as it may think fit..
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 43 of 2021, s. 21, for "enabling the Institute" (w.e.f. 25-5-2022). 2. Subs. by s. 21, ibid., for "pay to the Institute" (w.e.f. 25-5-2022).
